## Summary

Describe the change and the reason for it.

## Verification

- [ ] I previewed the site locally when changing public pages
- [ ] I ran `./scripts/web-quality-audit.sh .`
- [ ] I ran `./scripts/quality-cycle.sh . 0 9999` for public-facing or release-relevant changes
- [ ] I regenerated any affected generated artifacts
- [ ] I did not hand-edit `stack/index.html` if the stack snapshot changed
- [ ] I updated docs when workflow or structure changed

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know about generated files, redirects, DNS, or follow-up work.
